options.name: --base
options.description:
Base path to look for XML document files
(omit for current directory)

options.name: --xml-doc-file-name-patterns
options.description:
Set to a comma delimited list of XML
documentation file names to process (may
use wild cards like 'Butterfly.*', leave
blank to scan for assemblies in project
files, do not include paths). Example:
'Butterfly.Database.xml,Butterfly.Channel.
*'

options.name: --global-source-xml-files
options.description:
Set to a comma delimited list of xml
files to search for source xml comments.
Example: 'C:\Program Files
(x86)\Reference
Assemblies\Microsoft\Framework\.NETFramewo
rk\v4.X\mscorlib.xml

options.name: --exclude-types
options.description:
(Default: System.Object) Set to a comma
delimited list of types to exclude from
comments. Example: 'System.Object'

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
Include to overwrite existing xml files.
Omit to create new files with '.new.xml'
suffix.
